description: A stylish, fashionable choice from Inc. 5. With it's sleek simple design and comfortable Fit, this pair is perfect for every day wear.  The thong styled shape will perfectly complement ethnic or Western outfits.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you pack easily when you travel.UpperTextured footbed with top-stitch detailCord straps from midfoot to toe to hold foot in placeHas a toe separator to comfortably hold the foot in placeMetal studs on outside strap for styleOutsoleDurable outsole with low heel and textured floral design groovesSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
